wedge.verdictAmortizar: For the {{name}} loan, paying it down saves you {{saved}} in interest — more than the {{gain}} you'd earn investing.
wedge.verdictInvestir: For the {{name}} loan, investing earns you {{gain}} net — more than the {{saved}} you'd save paying it down.
wedge.verdictEqual: For the {{name}} loan, paying down and investing are practically equivalent.
